query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_puzzles, COUNT(DISTINCT openingName) as unique_openings, COUNT(DISTINCT openingVariation) as unique_variations, MIN(rating) as min_rating, MAX(rating) as max_rating, COUNT(DISTINCT ecoCode) as unique_eco_codes FROM puzzles;
